summary: WooCommerce integration feature complete testing - All 18 backend API tests passed (100%), Frontend UI tests passed (100%). The new WooCommerce export feature allows users to configure store connections, test connections, and export catalog products directly via WooCommerce REST API.

issues: Minor: Console warning 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in Login.jsx - not blocking but should be investigated

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs - create new config with all fields
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs - create with default name
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs - validation rejects missing required fields (422)
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs - unauthorized request rejected (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/woocommerce/configs - list all user configs
Backend: GET /api/woocommerce/configs - empty list for new user
Backend: GET /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - get specific config by ID
Backend: GET /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - 404 for non-existent config
Backend: PUT /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - update config name and URL
Backend: PUT /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - update API credentials
Backend: PUT /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - 404 for non-existent config
Backend: DELETE /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - delete config and verify removal
Backend: DELETE /api/woocommerce/configs/{id} - 404 for non-existent config
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs/{id}/test - 404 for non-existent config
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/configs/{id}/test - returns error status for invalid credentials
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/export - 404 for non-existent config
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/export - returns warning when no active catalog items
Backend: POST /api/woocommerce/export - unauthorized request rejected
Frontend: WooCommerce page loads correctly with title
Frontend: 4 stat cards visible (Tiendas Conectadas, Total Configuraciones, Productos en Catálogo, Productos Sincronizados)
Frontend: 'Añadir Tienda' button visible and clickable
Frontend: Add store modal opens with all 4 fields (name, URL, consumer_key, consumer_secret)
Frontend: Creating a store via UI succeeds with success toast
Frontend: New store appears in table with all columns (name, URL, status, products, last sync)
Frontend: Stats update after adding store
Frontend: WooCommerce link visible in sidebar navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx has React warning about updating state during render - consider using useEffect for navigation instead of direct setState in render
seed_data_creation: Created test WooCommerce configs with pattern TEST_WooStore_{uuid} during backend testing (auto-cleaned). Created 'Test Tienda UI' via frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WooCommerce integration is fully working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_woocommerce_endpoints.py cover all CRUD operations, connection test, and export endpoints. The woocommerce==3.0.0 Python library is installed. Real WooCommerce API testing requires valid store credentials. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: add-woo-config-btn, woo-name-input, woo-url-input, woo-key-input, woo-secret-input, woo-submit-btn, nav-woocommerce.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This is a new feature implementation, not a bug fix
